productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Press Sports Shoe
description: The nike Air Press features a full length nike Air sole for lasting comfort on the Basketball court. Stylish to the T and perfect for those hard games, this pair makes for a great lifestyle shoe too.Upper Hi-top silhouette for added support Breathable mesh and leather upper for durability, ventilation and added shoe structure Lace-up system for a snug Fit Perforations on the toe box and the sides for maximum ventilation Lushly padded collar for in-step comfort Padded tongue with mesh upper and textile lining for snug fit and breathability Midsole Full length phylon midsole with encapsulated Air-sole unit for maximum shock absorption Mildly cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Solid rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for maximum traction and easy multi-directional movement Fibre encapsulated air chamber on the outsole for style Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
